glossary.definition: A Vedic birth chart mapping planetary positions at the exact time and place of birth.
The ascendant — the zodiac sign rising on the eastern horizon at birth; the 1st house.
A zodiac sign; also the Moon-sign in common usage.
One of 27 lunar mansions, each spanning 13°20' of the zodiac.
A planet or node used in Jyotish (the nine grahas).
A house — one of twelve divisions of the chart governing areas of life.
A planetary period that times when results manifest; Vimshottari is the most common system.
Transit — the current movement of planets relative to the natal chart.
A specific planetary combination producing a defined result.
An affliction or imbalance in the chart (e.g. Mangal Dosha).
Ashtakoota compatibility scoring (out of 36) used in marriage matching.
An auspicious electional time chosen for an important activity.
The D9 divisional chart, used especially for marriage and inner strength of planets.
The Hindu almanac: tithi, vara, nakshatra, yoga and karana.
